panels.title: All Achievements
panels.infobox: 🏆 Most unlock through normal play; some require Endless Mode or specific playthroughs. Ending achievements require at least 10 runs for 100% completion.

entry_Achievement.name: Veteran Merchant
entry_Achievement.how: Reach Merchant Rank 30. Requires Endless Mode.

entry_Achievement.name: Exemplary Merchant
entry_Achievement.how: Sell 1 of every good. Requires finishing Endless Mode first.

entry_Achievement.name: Processed Food Master
entry_Achievement.how: Reach Goods Knowledge ★★★★★ in Processed Food.

entry_Achievement.name: Contract Master
entry_Achievement.how: Complete every contract. Track via the Contracts tab.

entry_Achievement.name: Eavesdropper
entry_Achievement.how: Collect all 188 rumors. Track via the Rumors tab.

entry_Achievement.name: Expansion Enthusiast
entry_Achievement.how: Expand cart to maximum size (15 spaces).

entry_Achievement.name: Working is Hard
entry_Achievement.how: Don't pay off a loan (let it expire).

entry_Achievement.name: I Win!
entry_Achievement.how: Complete Amati's challenge. See Contracts tab for details.

entry_Achievement.name: Close with Holo
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A ending with Holo.

entry_Achievement.name: Close with Norah
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A ending with Norah.

entry_Achievement.name: Close with Eve
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A ending with Eve.

entry_Achievement.name: Close with Luka
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A ending with Luka.

entry_Achievement.name: Very Close with Holo
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A+ ending with Holo.

entry_Achievement.name: Very Close with Norah
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A+ ending with Norah.

entry_Achievement.name: Very Close with Eve
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A+ ending with Eve.

entry_Achievement.name: Very Close with Luka
entry_Achievement.how: Get the A+ ending with Luka.

entry_Achievement.name: Just Barely
entry_Achievement.how: End a run with 0 silver. Pay the 3,000 silver informant with exactly your loan amount in NG+.

entry_Achievement.name: CG Collector
entry_Achievement.how: View nearly every event, ending, and complete Endless Mode. Also requires FAILING Luka's meat-eating event.
entry_Achievement.note: See Events tab — Luka Events|49 must be deliberately failed.

entry_Achievement.name: Together with Holo
entry_Achievement.how: See Holo B, A, and A+ endings.

entry_Achievement.name: Together with Norah
entry_Achievement.how: See Norah B, A, and A+ endings.

entry_Achievement.name: Together with Eve
entry_Achievement.how: See Eve B, A, and A+ endings.

entry_Achievement.name: Together with Luka
entry_Achievement.how: See Luka B, A, and A+ endings.

entry_Achievement.name: Avid Traveler
entry_Achievement.how: Complete the story 10 times (same save file, NG+ chain).

entry_Achievement.name: Lady-Killer?!
entry_Achievement.how: Make Holo jealous by buying food for another companion 3 times.

entry_Achievement.name: A Man's Dream
entry_Achievement.how: Watch 'Extra Spicey and Wolf' bonus scene from main menu after completing Endless Mode.
